steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks where the National Association of Black Journalists was founded. The answer must come directly from the passage.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'New York City': never mentioned in the passage as the founding location. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Atlanta': never mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Washington, DC': the passage explicitly states the organization ‘was founded in Washington, DC, in 1975.’ ✓
  • Choice D — 'Chicago': never mentioned in the passage. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
